brand_voice_summary: Holloshoe and Hollomen both emphasize a blend of modern style with classic elegance, focusing on high-quality materials and sophisticated design. Holloshoe leans towards a rugged yet refined aesthetic, often highlighting heritage and street style elements. Hollomen, on the other hand, emphasizes a polished, executive look with a focus on comfort and subtle design details.
naming_formula: Brand Name + Descriptive Material + Design Feature + Product Type (e.g., 'Men's White Leather Low-Top Trainer - Minimalist Style')

tone_characteristics.formality: Moderately formal with a focus on elegance and sophistication.
tone_characteristics.adjective_density: High, with frequent use of descriptive adjectives to convey luxury and style.
tone_characteristics.seo_patterns: Product titles often include material, color, and style descriptors, likely to optimize for search relevance.
